since_last: 58% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.34%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC +2.45% · Gold +2.10% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 58% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.34%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.34%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -5.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -21.44%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +8.13%, LSCC +7.22%, KLAC +6.98%, AMAT +6.85%, LRCX +6.45%. Laggards: IBM -21.44%, WDAY -9.29%, NOW -7.58%, INTU -7.08%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.03% at $140.57
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
